headline: Is It Time To Reassess Super Micro Computer (SMCI) After The Hindenburg Short Seller Report
summary: If you are wondering whether Super Micro Computer's share price still offers value, or if most of the opportunity is already priced in, this article walks you through what the current numbers may be saying. The stock last closed at US$25.26, with returns of 8.8% over 7 days, a 17.9% decline over 30 days, an 18.4% decline year to date, a 23.8% decline over 1 year, around 2.3x gains over 3 years, and a very large gain over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on how Super Micro Computer fits...
